---
name: Impersonation or unsafe download report
about: Report unofficial repos, mirrors, installers, or downloads using this guide's name
title: "[Impersonation] "
labels: security, impersonation
assignees: ""
---

## What did you find?

Link to the repo, website, package, download page, or post:

## Why does it look unsafe or misleading?

Examples: claims to be the official source, promotes an `.exe` or binary `.zip`,
changes setup commands, removes benchmark provenance, or redirects downloads.

## Evidence

Paste short public evidence here. Screenshots are useful.

Do not paste passwords, API keys, private SSH keys, private model URLs, or other secrets.

## Expected canonical source

The official repository is:

```text
https://github.com/hogeheer499-commits/strix-halo-guide
```
